title: Tick Control Great Neck
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Great Neck, NY. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Expert Long Island tick removal starting at $125. Call today!
intro: Great Neck residents enjoy beautiful tree-lined neighborhoods and proximity to parks like Great Neck Park and Kings Point Park, but these lush environments also create ideal habitats for ticks. Our professional tick control services protect your Great Neck property from deer ticks, dog ticks, and the diseases they carry, with treatments ranging from $125 to $325 depending on property size and infestation level.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Great Neck and the North Shore of Long Island for years with specialized tick treatment programs designed for our unique coastal climate and vegetation. Our licensed technicians understand the specific tick pressures facing Great Neck properties, from waterfront estates to village homes, and use EPA-approved products that are safe for children and pets.
localContext: Great Neck's proximity to wooded areas, beaches, and parks like Stepping Stone Park makes tick prevention especially important for homeowners throughout Great Neck Plaza, Kings Point, and surrounding villages. The mature landscaping and abundant wildlife in these established neighborhoods create perfect conditions for tick populations to thrive, making regular professional treatment essential for families who enjoy their outdoor spaces.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Great Neck?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Great Neck typically runs from April through November, with peak activity in May, June, and July. However, during mild winters on Long Island, ticks can remain active year-round. We recommend beginning preventative treatments in early spring and maintaining regular applications throughout the warm months for maximum protection.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Great Neck?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Great Neck range from $125 to $325 per treatment, depending on your property size, the severity of the infestation, and whether you choose a one-time treatment or seasonal program. Most residential properties fall in the $175-$225 range. We offer free estimates and can customize a treatment plan that fits your budget and protection needs.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for my children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered tick control products that are safe for children and pets when applied by our certified technicians. We typically recommend keeping people and pets off treated areas for 2-3 hours until the product dries. Our treatments target ticks while minimizing impact on beneficial insects and pollinators in your Great Neck garden.

faqs.question: What areas of my Great Neck property should be treated for ticks?
faqs.answer: We focus on tick hotspots including the perimeter of your lawn where it meets wooded areas or tall grass, landscaped beds, stone walls, playground areas, and shaded spots under decks or shrubs. Great Neck properties near parks or with mature trees require special attention to ground-level vegetation and transition zones where ticks typically wait for hosts.
